zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Tuite於1308年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉勒時，她的父親Richard Tuite35歲，母親Margery de Cusack32歲。她於1322年與Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯吉勒結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Tuite于1308年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉勒时，她的父亲Richard Tuite35岁，母亲Margery de Cusack32岁。她于1322年与Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯吉勒结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Tuite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conan.
Irish (Leinster; of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places called Le Thuit in Eure, France, named with Old Norse thveit ‘meadow’. Compare Thwaites .

variants.name: Thwaites
meanings: English: from the northern English placename Thwaite (Old Norse thveit ‘meadow, paddock’) + plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. The plural form is found in several placenames, including Thwaites in Keighley (Yorkshire), which is a principal source of the surname.

variants.name: Tweed
meanings: Irish (Antrim; of Norman origin): variant of   Tuite  .
English (mainly East Anglia): sometimes a variant of   Thwaites  , or   Twite  .
Scottish: probably a shortened form of   Tweddle  .

variants.name: Tuitt
meanings: Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tuite  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Tuite was born in 1308, in Killeen, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Richard Tuite, was 35 and her mother, Margery de Cusack, was 32. She married Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen in 1322, in Killeen, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Tuite est née en 1308, à Killeen, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Richard Tuite, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margery de Cusack, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen en 1322, à Killeen, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Tuite 1308 in Killeen, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Tuite 35 und ihre Mutter Margery de Cusack 32. Sie hat 1322 in Killeen, County Meath, Irland Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Tuite è nata il nel 1308 nel Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Richard Tuite, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Margery de Cusack, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen nel 1322, nel Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Tuiteが1308年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスキリーンで生まれた時，父Richard Tuiteは35歳，母Margery de Cusackは32歳であった。1322年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスキリーンでWalter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Tuite(이)가 1308년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 킬린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Tuite(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery de Cusack(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1322년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 킬린에서 Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Tuite nasceu em 1308, em Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Richard Tuite, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Cusack, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen em 1322, em Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Tuite родилась в 1308 г. в местности киллин, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Richard Tuite было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Cusack, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen в 1322 г. в местности киллин, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Tuite nació en 1308, en Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Richard Tuite, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margery de Cusack, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Walter Cusack Baron of Clonee and Killeen en 1322, en Killeen, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
